# ISSUE_TEMPLATE Directory — GitHub Issue Templates

## Overview
The `ISSUE_TEMPLATE` directory defines the structure, metadata, and user experience for all GitHub issues created in this repository.  
These templates ensure consistent reporting, standardized triage, and predictable formatting across all issue types.

All contents are categorized automatically based on filename semantics.  
A complete alphabetical index is included at the bottom.

---

# CATEGORIZED DIRECTORY

## 1. Issue Templates
These templates define the fields and structure for different types of issues.

bug_report.yml  
feature_request.yml  

## 2. Template Configuration
Repository‑wide configuration for how GitHub displays and manages issue templates.

config.yml  

---

# A–Z INDEX OF ALL FILES

bug_report.yml  
config.yml  
feature_request.yml

# Summary
The `ISSUE_TEMPLATE` directory centralizes all GitHub issue templates and configuration.  
It ensures consistent issue creation, predictable triage, and a professional user experience across the repository.
